report.summary: Fixed accessibility violations on both new learn pages (badge font sizes 12px→14px, stat labels 12px→13px, link sizes 13px→14px) and added focus-visible/hover interaction styles to TOC and Related Guide navigation links.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Virtuals Protocol guide: Bumped header badge font sizes from 12px to 14px (WCAG accessibility minimum) with increased padding
Virtuals Protocol guide: Bumped agent category badge font sizes from 12px to 14px in Top Agents section
Virtuals Protocol guide: Added focus-visible outlines (2px solid #6366f1) and hover underline to all 8 TOC links
Virtuals Protocol guide: Added hover background transition and focus-visible outlines to Related Guide links, increased font from 13px to 14px
GRASS Protocol guide: Bumped all 3 header badge font sizes from 12px to 14px with increased padding
GRASS Protocol guide: Bumped stat label font size from 12px to 13px in By the Numbers grid
GRASS Protocol guide: Bumped investor info font size from 12px to 13px in Team & Funding section
GRASS Protocol guide: Added focus-visible outlines and hover underline to all 8 TOC links
GRASS Protocol guide: Added hover transitions and focus-visible outlines to Related Guide links, increased font from 13px to 14px
Both pages: Added embedded <style> block with .toc-link and .related-link hover/focus-visible rules for keyboard accessibility

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG images verified: og-virtuals-protocol-guide.svg (1200x630) — already exists from earlier cycle
OG images verified: og-grass-protocol-depin-guide.svg (1200x630) — already exists from earlier cycle

sections.title: Known Issues (Deferred)
items: Global focus-visible styles still not in globals.css — recommend adding site-wide :focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 2px; } for all interactive elements
Section spacing inconsistency across learn guides (40px/44px/48px) — recommend standardizing via shared layout component
Heading hierarchy: some older guides skip h3 level — audit and standardize across all guides
